name: xau_bb_rsi_mean_rev_m15_v1
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, when price closes outside a 20-period Bollinger Band (2.0σ) with RSI(2) in extreme territory AND BB width is above its 40th percentile (non-dead range), price mean-reverts to the middle band within 24 bars. A low-ADX regime filter excludes strong trends where mean-reversion fails.

entry.long: close < lower_bb(20,2.0) AND rsi(2) < 10 AND prior_bar_close >= lower_bb
entry.short: close > upper_bb(20,2.0) AND rsi(2) > 90 AND prior_bar_close <= upper_bb

exit.take_profit: middle_bb(20) OR opposite_bb whichever hit first

notes: Instrumentation mandatory given prior-gen zero-trade failure. Verify broker symbol alias resolves (XAUUSD/GOLD). No session filter to avoid TZ bug.
